questions.q: What are the top 10 news headlines right now?
Summarize this week's biggest tech news in 5 bullet points.
Did the Fed change interest rates at the latest meeting? What did Powell say?
What's the latest update on the Russia-Ukraine conflict this week?
What are the current poll numbers for the next US election cycle?
When is the next F1 race and where? Show the lineup of the next 3 races.
Who won the latest NBA games last night and where do the playoff standings sit right now?
When does the next Premier League season start, and which clubs got relegated last season?
Where are energy stocks today? List the top 5 by market cap with current prices.
What's the GDP growth of India and the US right now? What's holding each economy back, and what are the short- and medium-term opportunities?
What's a sensible mix of index funds for a 35-year-old with a $50K portfolio, moderate risk?
What's Bitcoin's price now and what are the main drivers this week?
Are 30-year mortgage rates trending up or down this month? Show the current national average.
What are the best AI coding tools available right now? Which one suits a senior backend engineer best?
I have a $2,000 budget for a video-editing laptop. Compare the best Mac and Windows options.
How do ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini actually differ in real use today? Cover coding, writing, and reasoning.
Is my iPhone 13 still worth keeping or should I upgrade to the iPhone 16? What's the practical difference?
My 10-year-old wants to start an instrument. Compare guitar, piano, drums, and ukulele on cost, learning curve, and noise.
I want to start acoustic guitar with a $400 budget. Which model and 3 starter accessories do I actually need?
What are the top 10 albums released this year across genres? One-line description of each.
What major art exhibitions are running in New York and London this month?
Which Banksy pieces sold at auction last year and for how much? Show a quick table.
What are the must-see films at the next Cannes Film Festival, and when does it run?
What are the top 10 nonfiction books released this year? Give a one-line summary of each.
I just finished Project Hail Mary and loved it. Suggest 5 similar books I'd enjoy.
Cheapest flight deals from New York to Tokyo in the next 3 months?
Is it a good time to visit Japan now, and what's the cherry blossom forecast?
Suggest 3 underrated European cities for a 5-day September trip, under $2,000 per person excluding flights.
What are the trending restaurants in San Francisco right now, and which 3 are actually worth the wait?
Give me a 30-minute weeknight dinner for two using pantry staples.
Which protein powder is genuinely worth buying right now? Compare 3 popular brands on price, taste, and ingredients.
What are the highest-paying entry-level tech jobs right now that don't require a CS degree?
Is an MBA still worth it in 2026? Compare the top 3 programs by ROI for a mid-career engineer.
What's the latest research on creatine for people over 40? Should I take it?
I'm 42, sit at a desk all day, and want to start running. Give me a realistic 8-week beginner plan.
